payload.title: Multi-tenant Postgres event log + cache
payload.description: Sub-epic: move the canonical event log and derived cache off per-workspace SQLite onto shared Postgres with airtight tenant isolation. Holds the schema, replay port, upload primitive, incremental replay, isolation, and migration stories. Done when a hosted tenant can upload events and read a replayed board with cross-tenant access impossible. (From SCP-124; folds in the prior storage proposal.)
